title: Why Are Big Tech Companies Cutting Jobs and Blaming AI?
summary: Big tech companies like Google, Amazon, and Meta are cutting many jobs, and they are saying it's because of artificial intelligence (AI). AI is a type of technology that helps machines think and do tasks like humans. These companies say AI lets them do more work with fewer people. For example, Meta's boss Mark Zuckerberg thinks AI will change how we work by 2026. Jack Dorsey from Block says AI tools help smaller teams work better. But some people are skeptical and think companies might be using AI as an excuse to save money or make shareholders happy instead of just blaming costs. This is happening now at many tech firms around the world.

keywords.explanation: Artificial intelligence, which is technology that helps machines think and do tasks like people.
When companies reduce the number of workers they have.
Big businesses that make or use technology, like Google or Meta.
When people doubt or don't fully believe something.
People who own parts of a company and want it to make money.

questions.question: What are big tech companies blaming for job cuts?
Who is the boss of Meta mentioned in the summary?
What does AI help companies do according to the summary?
options: Do more work with fewer people
questions.correct_answer: Do more work with fewer people

questions.question: Why are some people skeptical about the AI excuse?
options: They think companies want to save money
They think AI is not real
They think companies are hiring more
questions.correct_answer: They think companies want to save money

questions.question: What year does Mark Zuckerberg think AI will change work?
What is a shareholder?
options: A person who owns part of a company
questions.correct_answer: A person who owns part of a company

background_read: Big tech companies are businesses that use computers and the internet to make products like social media or apps. They often have many employees. Artificial intelligence (AI) is a new technology that can do tasks automatically, like answering questions or organizing data. Sometimes, companies cut jobs to save money or because they don't need as many workers. This article talks about how tech companies are now saying AI is the reason for job cuts, but some people wonder if it's really true or just an excuse.
Article_Structure: WHO: Big tech companies like Google, Amazon, Meta, and bosses like Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey.
WHAT: They are cutting jobs and blaming it on artificial intelligence (AI).
WHERE: This is happening at tech companies around the world.
WHY: They say AI helps do more work with fewer people, but skeptics think it might be to save money or please shareholders.

perspectives.description: They believe AI is a good reason for job cuts because it makes work more efficient.
They doubt the AI excuse and think companies might be cutting jobs for other reasons like cost savings.
